raw_response: The Belkin ultra-compact charger is an excellent choice for your bedside setup due to its small size and lightweight design. It fits perfectly on a nightstand without taking up much space. Although it lacks GaN technology and supports only one device at 25W, its affordability within your budget makes it a practical option despite your moderate price sensitivity.
